texto: True saints know that the place where all the joy comes from is far deeper than that of feelings
autor: joy comes from the place of the very presence of God. Joy is God and God is joy and joy doesn't negate all other emotions - joy transcends all other emotions.
explicacao: Citação de joy comes from the place of the very presence of God. Joy is God and God is joy and joy doesn't negate all other emotions - joy transcends all other emotions. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “True saints know that the place where all the joy comes from is far deeper than that of feelings” articula reflexao, ann-voskamp, saints em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
